title: Benebone Indestructible Fishbone Dog Chew Toy for Aggressive Chewers, Long Lasting Tough Boredom Breaker for Dogs, Real Jack Salmon Flavour, For Medium Dogs, Made in the USA.
features: ROBUST LONG-LASTING CHEW - For strong dogs who fancy a proper gnaw. This Fishbone dog toy is virtually indestructible and tough enough for those enthusiastic chewers, cleverly curved for a paw-friendly grip, and made with delicious real salmon-infused nylon that'll have your canine companion coming back for more.

GENUINE JACK SALMON FLAVOUR – Inspired by the finest protein from the sea, these dog bones are flavoured with real Jack Salmon (no worries, only your dog can detect it). Just two simple ingredients: Real Jack Salmon and Nylon—no nasty chemicals in these premium dog chews.

BRILLIANT BOREDOM BUSTER – The Fishbone features a clever curved design for easy gripping so your dog can enjoy a satisfying chew, while still providing a proper challenge. These indestructible dog toys are perfect for medium-sized breeds up to 60 lb, such as Australian Shepherds and Doodles.

DURABILITY GUIDANCE - While these dog chews are impressively long-lasting, we recommend replacing after a month, or sooner to stay on the safe side. If more than a sugar cube's worth has vanished, it's time for a fresh one to keep your furry friend happy and safe.

ABOUT BENEBONE - Crafted in the USA, we only use real flavours in our dog toys and focus on creating long-lasting dog bones designed to keep your dog entertained for hours. Questions? Give us a shout and you'll speak with a real person dedicated to keeping both you and your dog completely satisfied.
description: Product Description How long does a Benebone last? In a few weeks, maybe a month, it’s usually time to retire. It varies from one dog to the next, so keep a close eye out for wear and tear. If you’re handy, try smoothing gnarly spots with a wood file or heavy grit sandpaper to prolong life. Are Benebones edible? Benebones have just the right amount of tantalising flavour to enhance your pup’s chewing experience. Our bones are made for a good chew session, but are not edible treats to be consumed. Watch for signs of wear and replace when necessary! Which size is best for my pup? We’ve got you covered with tiny bones for cute little 15-pounders, Giant bones for hundred-pounders and everything in between. If your pup is between sizes or an enthusiastic chewer, consider sizing up. Your pup will thank you! What are the ingredients? Benebones are made with USA-sourced nylon and flavoured with a variety of real ingredients like yummy bacon, chicken, peanut, beef tripe, maple wood and jack salmon. What’s different about a puppy Benebone? Our puppy Benebones are a tad softer for puppies without all their adult teeth just yet. Once your dog has adult teeth, it’s time to move on to our regular chews
